programme.title: Alien Contact: Triangle Phenomenon
programme.desc: There are some who believe that life here is being monitored by life out there.

programme.title: Aliens On Our Streets
programme.desc: Documentary showcasing UFO sightings and video evidence, featuring government physicist and eyewitness testimo

programme.title: Alien Contact: Government Coverup
programme.desc: Uncover the truth behind the Roswell coverup! Are we alone, or was the truth hidden in plain sight?

programme.title: Aliens In America: The Pascagoula Case
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous Pascagoula alien abduction case with new evidence and expert insight.

programme.title: Maestra
programme.desc: Five women participate in 'La Maestra', the only competition in the world for female orchestra conductors.

programme.title: Brisa
programme.desc: A survivor of childhood sexual violence fights for justice at the Inter-American Court of Human Rights.

programme.title: Country Brawlers
programme.desc: Appalachian boxers fight addiction & poverty, finding purpose in the ring. A raw, powerful story.

programme.title: Death in the Spotlight
programme.desc: Uncovers the tragic deaths of iconic figures and explores their enduring legacies.

programme.title: The Beatles: The Sound of a Revolution
programme.desc: Explore the band that revolutionized music! Rare footage & iconic performances define their legacy.

programme.title: Behind the Lyrics: The Beatles
programme.desc: The Beatles made love a legacy, romantic, raw, and timeless. Their songs still speak to us today.

programme.title: A Head Shorter
programme.desc: Holocaust survivor's animated story of survival, impossible choices, and enduring hope.

programme.title: Denzel Washington: American Icon
programme.desc: A documentary exploring Denzel Washington's legendary career and lasting impact on Hollywood.

programme.title: Catherine: 21st Century Princess
programme.desc: Catherine Middleton journey from small-town life to one of the most admired figures in the royal family.

programme.title: Hugh Grant: Love Language
programme.desc: A look at Hugh Grant's rise as the beloved king of romantic comedies.

programme.title: Hugh Jackman: The Showman
programme.desc: Documentary exploring Hugh Jackman's journey from Australia to international stardom through film, Broadway, a

programme.title: Space Explorers: Moonrise on the ISS
programme.desc: Aboard the ISS, seven astronauts train for Artemis—with space as the proving ground for returning to the moon.

programme.title: UFO Secrets From Russia
programme.desc: Discover these secrets, and more, as we work to uncover the UFO Secrets From Russia.

programme.title: Unacknowledged
programme.desc: Top-secret evidence supporting Extraterrestrial contact from the historic files of the Disclosure Project.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Fifth Kind - Contact has Begun
programme.desc: Dr. Steve Greer presents information that the architects of secrecy don't want you to know.

programme.title: The Lost Century
programme.desc: A 100 years of secrecy has cost humans hundreds of years of spiritual, cultural & technological developments.
